queries.question: List the activities offered by every resort.
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.activityName  from Resorts_Activities join Activities on Resorts_Activities.activityID = Activities.activityID join Resorts on Resorts_Activities.resortID = Resorts.id   GROUP BY Resorts_Activities.activityID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Resorts_Activities.resortID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Resorts)

queries.question: List the activities offered by every resort.
queries.sql: select resorts.name , activities.activityname from Resorts_Activities join Activities on Resorts_Activities.activityID = Activities.activityID join Resorts on Resorts_Activities.resortID = Resorts.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?activityname WHERE {
  ?resorts_activities a :Resorts_Activities .
  ?activities a :Activities .
  ?resorts_activities p:hasActivities ?activities .
  ?resorts a :Resorts .
  ?resorts_activities p:hasResorts ?resorts .
  ?resorts p:name ?name .
  ?activities p:activityName ?activityname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the activities offered by every resort.
